description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and test, using the node:latest Docker image globally. Add a build job named install_dependencies that runs `npm install`, stores the node_modules/ directory as an artifact, and runs in the build stage. Add a test job named test_with_lab that runs `npm test` in the test stage. Add a code_quality job that runs with the docker:stable image and docker:stable-dind service, sets DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2, executes `export SP_VERSION=$(echo \"$CI_SERVER_VERSION\" | sed 's/^\\([0-9]*\\)\\.\\([0-9]*\\).*/\\1-\\2-stable/')` then `docker run --env SOURCE_CODE=\"$PWD\" --volume \"$PWD\":/code --volume /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock \"registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/security-products/codequality:$SP_VERSION\" /code`, allows failure, and uploads gl-code-quality-report.json as an artifact. Add a dependency_scanning job that also uses docker:stable with docker:stable-dind, sets DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2, runs `export SP_VERSION=$(echo \"$CI_SERVER_VERSION\" | sed 's/^\\([0-9]*\\)\\.\\([0-9]*\\).*/\\1-\\2-stable/')` then `docker run --env DEP_SCAN_DISABLE_REMOTE_CHECKS=\"${DEP_SCAN_DISABLE_REMOTE_CHECKS:-false}\" --volume \"$PWD:/code\" --volume /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock \"registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/security-products/dependency-scanning:$SP_VERSION\" /code`, allows failure, and uploads gl-dependency-scanning-report.json as an artifact.
